title: London Double Decker Red Bus and Black Taxi Mini Models (Pull Back & Go Action) Made of Die Cast Metal and Plastic Parts
features: Mini versions, for small hands - the dimensions of the taxi are 7.2 cm x 2.9 cm (including wheels) x 3.5 cm and the ones of the bus, 7.5 cm x 4.6 cm (including wheels) x 2.6 cm.
Made of Die Cast Metal with Plastic Parts.
Pull Back and Go Action Models
London Souvenir Bus and Taxi Mini Models
description: London Big Red Double Decker Bus and Black Taxi mini models made of Die-Cast metal. These are Pull Back and Go Action mini models, i.e. Friction Models. The dimensions of the taxi are 7.2 cm x 2.9 cm (including wheels) x 3.5 cm and the ones of the bus, 7.5 cm x 4.6 cm (including wheels) x 2.6 cm. London souvenir toy bus and taxi models. Ideal for children over the age of 3 years. They come in a window presentation box.
